    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    I

    informUser(String) - Static method in class whistapp.ui.CLI
    A helper method for showing messages to the user in a consistent format.
    initializeHumanPlayers(ArrayList) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.ScoreGame
    A method initializing given players for a game.
    isAutonomous() - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.BotPlayer
     
    isAutonomous() - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A method for knowing if a Player requires some input from the CLI.
    isAutonomous(int) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Determines if the player at the given index is autonomous (a bot).
    isAutonomous(int) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Finds if the player at the given index is autonomous (a bot).
    isAutonomous(int) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    Finds if the player at the given index is autonomous (a bot).
    isBidSuccessful(HashMap) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Solo
    Checks if the bid was successful.
    isBidSuccessful(HashMap, Player) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Abondance
    Checks if the declarer won the bid.
    isBidSuccessful(HashMap, Player) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Miserie
    Checks if the declarer won the bid.
    isCurrentTrickOver() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    Returns true if the current trick is fully played.
    isDeclarer(Player) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Bid
    Simple checker for if a given player is a declarer of this bid
    isEmpty() - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
    A simple getter giving whether this hand is empty or not.
    isFreeAbondance() - Method in enum class whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
    Returns true if this BidType is a free-trump Abondance variant.
    isHigherBidThan(BidType) - Method in enum class whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
    Checks if the current bid is higher than the given bid.
    isOriginalTrumpAbondance() - Method in enum class whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
    A simple getter that determines if this BidType is an abondance variant with the original trump trait, meaning the round will have the trump of the last dealt card, instead of the first played card.
    isOver() - Method in class whistapp.domain.Trick
    A simple method to check if the trick is fully played.
    isRightAmountOfDeclarers(ArrayList, int) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Bid
    A simple helper method that checks for a certain amount of declarers in a given declarer array.
    isSameCard(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Card
    A checker to see if a given card equals this card.
    isTeamSuccessful(int, int) - Method in class whistapp.domain.bids.Proposal
    Helper method to check if the declarers won the bid.
    isTrickOver() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Returns true if the current trick is completely played.
    isTrickOver() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    Returns true if the current trick is completely played.
    isValidCardForPlaying(String, Suit) - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
    A simple checker to see if a certain played card is valid for playing from this hand.
    isValidFinalRoundBid() - Method in enum class whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
    A simple getter that determines if a bid can be a round bid.
